title: Spec doc front-matter
description: YAML front matter for files under docs/spec/. Validated by scripts/check_frontmatter.py and enforced by .github/workflows/frontmatter.yml.

tokens.description: Approximate token count of the prose body (front-matter excluded). Rough wc-based estimate; treat as planning guidance, not a hard cap. The token-budget auditor (scripts/check_token_budget.py) verifies the declared value is within tolerance of measurement.

load_for.description: Task tags this doc is required for. AGENTS.md context routing references these to assemble per-task minimum load sets. New tags require a schema PR.

depends_on.description: Numeric prerequisites — spec docs that must be loaded before this one is meaningful. Each entry resolves to docs/spec/NN-*.md (or docs/spec/NN.5-*.md). Cycles are rejected.

kind.description: Documentation taxonomy. `contract` for normative spec (HM-REQ/HM-INV bearing); `explanation` for narrative why-docs; `reference` for catalogs, glossaries, and indexes. Diátaxis-derived; see docs/CONTRIBUTING-DOCS.md for the rationale.

last_updated.description: Optional ISO date convenience marker. When present, scripts/check_staleness.py asserts it matches the file's actual git last-modified date within ±1 day. Run `python3 scripts/check_staleness.py --update` to auto-sync. Absent is fine — git is the source of truth.

internal_only.description: Optional list of HM-REQ/HM-INV IDs whose enforcement is purely internal (CI gate, code-shape) and have no surface-observable manifestation. Used by scripts/check_system_test_traceability.py to exempt these IDs from the 'every requirement has a system-test scenario' rule. Only meaningful in docs/spec/requirements.md and docs/spec/invariants.md.

evidence.description: Optional doc-level empirical posture per docs/spec/25-rigor-framework.md. well-supported = cited research/standard backs every normative claim; reasoned-design = design choices with stated rationale (default for internal-mechanism docs); assumption = at least one normative claim rests on an unproven empirical claim flagged in 00.5 § C; tbd = deferred until a named trigger. Optional today; the grounding gate ratchets coverage and will eventually require it on every kind: contract doc.
